zh.Zwiefalten, Reutlingen, Baden-Wuerttembe: 德國巴登-爾特波格藍德可萊斯 雷特林根次維法爾騰

zh.lifeSummary: 當Diepold II von Berg-Schelklingen於1097年出生在德國爾特波格可萊斯 布勞倫爾可林根時，他的父親Count Heinrich von Berg of Berg-Schelklingen28歲，母親Adelaide von Mochental von Vohburg24歲。他於大約1149年與Gisela von Andechs von Diessen結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1165年5月19日在德國享年68歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Diepold II von Berg-Schelklingen于1097年出生在德国爾特波格可萊斯 布勞倫爾可林根时，他的父亲Count Heinrich von Berg of Berg-Schelklingen28岁，母亲Adelaide von Mochental von Vohburg24岁。他于大约1149年与Gisela von Andechs von Diessen结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1165年5月19日在德国享年68岁。

nameMeanings.name: Diepold
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: from a variant of the personal name Dietbald (see Theobald ).

variants.name: Theobald
meanings: From an Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from þeud ‘people, race’ + bald ‘bold, brave’. The first element was altered under the influence of Greek theos ‘god’. This name was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain.

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant of   Ivo  , derived from the oblique case of the name.

en.lifeSummary: When Diepold II von Berg-Schelklingen was born in 1097, in Schelklingen, Blaubeuren, Württemberg, Germany, his father, Count Heinrich von Berg of Berg-Schelklingen, was 28 and his mother, Adelaide von Mochental von Vohburg, was 24. He married Gisela von Andechs von Diessen about 1149. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died on 19 May 1165, in Germany, at the age of 68.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Diepold II von Berg-Schelklingen est né en 1097, à Schelklingen, Kreis Blaubeuren, Württemberg, Allemagne, son père, Count Heinrich von Berg of Berg-Schelklingen, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Adelaide von Mochental von Vohburg, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Gisela von Andechs von Diessen environ 1149. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé le 19 mai 1165, à Allemagne, à l’âge de 68 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Diepold II von Berg-Schelklingen 1097 in Schelklingen, Kreis Blaubeuren, Württemberg, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Count Heinrich von Berg of Berg-Schelklingen 28 und seine Mutter Adelaide von Mochental von Vohburg 24. Er hat um 1149 Gisela von Andechs von Diessen geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 19. Mai 1165 im Alter von 68 Jahren in Deutschland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Diepold II von Berg-Schelklingen è nato il nel 1097 nel Schelklingen, Kreis Blaubeuren, Württemberg, Germania, il suo padre, Count Heinrich von Berg of Berg-Schelklingen, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Adelaide von Mochental von Vohburg, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Gisela von Andechs von Diessen circa 1149. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 19 maggio 1165, nel Germania, all'età di 68 anni.

ja.Mellrichstadt, Bavaria, Germany: ドイツバイエルンランドクレイス メルリチスタト

ja.lifeSummary: Diepold II von Berg-Schelklingenが1097年にドイツウuルッテンバーグクレイス ブラウベウレンシェルクリンジェンで生まれた時，父Count Heinrich von Berg of Berg-Schelklingenは28歳，母Adelaide von Mochental von Vohburgは24歳であった。約1149年にGisela von Andechs von Diessenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1165年5月19日にドイツで68歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Diepold II von Berg-Schelklingen(이)가 1097년 독일 wu르테버그 크레이스 블로브우런 셸클링에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Count Heinrich von Berg of Berg-Schelklingen(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Adelaide von Mochental von Vohburg(은)는 24세였다. 그는 대략 1149년 Gisela von Andechs von Diessen(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1165년 5월 19일 독일에서 68세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Diepold II von Berg-Schelklingen nasceu em 1097, em Schelklingen, Kreis Blaubeuren, Württemberg, Alemanha, seu pai, Count Heinrich von Berg of Berg-Schelklingen, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Adelaide von Mochental von Vohburg, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Gisela von Andechs von Diessen aproximadamente 1149. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 19 de maio de 1165, em Alemanha, com 68 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Diepold II von Berg-Schelklingen родился в 1097 г. в местности щелклинген, крис блаубеурен, вuрттембирг, Германия, его отцу по имени Count Heinrich von Berg of Berg-Schelklingen было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Adelaide von Mochental von Vohburg, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Gisela von Andechs von Diessen около 1149 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер 19 мая 1165 г. в местности Германия в возрасте 68 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Diepold II von Berg-Schelklingen nació en 1097, en Schelklingen, Kreis Blaubeuren, Württemberg, Alemania, su papá, Count Heinrich von Berg of Berg-Schelklingen, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Adelaide von Mochental von Vohburg, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Gisela von Andechs von Diessen aproximadamente 1149. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 19 de mayo de 1165, en Alemania, a la edad de 68 años.
